awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome V frameworks, libraries, software and resources.
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of awesome V frameworks, libraries, software and resources.

nodes.itemHTML: • vsl.vcl - VCL is a high level way of writting programs with OpenCL using V. These are highly opinionated OpenCL bindings for V. It tries to make GPU computing easy, with some sugar abstraction, V's concurrency and channels.
• vgurastars17 - Official Gura parser for V.

• vslstars211 - VSL is a Scientific Library with a great variety of different modules. Although most modules offer pure-V definitions, VSL also provides modules that wrap known C libraries among other backends that allow high performance computing as an alternative. Also provides opinionated wrappers for OpenBLAS, LAPACKE, MPI, OpenCL among other libraries.
• vtlstars84 - The V Tensor Library is a numerical computing library supporting n-dimensional data structure, backed by VSL.
• portctlstars3 - CLI tool to manage Docker Swarm resources using Portainer API.
• HN-topstars19 - A simple command to list most recent news from hacker-news.
• klonolstars14 - CLI tool to help you "clone all" git repositories belonging to you. Works with GitHub and Gitea.
• runnerstars24 - A tool that automates running/compiling code written in various programming languages.
• symlinkerstars7 - A small Linux tool to manage symlinks.
• vaststars23 - A simple tool for vlang, generate v source file to AST json file.
• vcredits - A tool that creates CREDITS from LICENSE files of dependencies.
• vervestars3 - Simple and fast static file server.
• vinitstars13 - A tool to generate v projects.
• vLogQLstars12 - A tiny command-line utility to query LogQL APIs.
• vqrcodestars11 - CLI for creating QR Codes.
• vspectstars2 - A tool to inspect vlang source file. ( Archived )
• text_editor - Small text editor from the official V examples.
• Boundstonestars44 - High Performance / Fast Compilation / Lightweight Minecraft: Bedrock Edition Server.
• flappylearning-v - A simple flappy learning demo in v. ( Archived )
• Kurarinstars26 - osu! beatmap visualizer made in V. Example video.
• minesweeperstars22 - A simple Minesweeper game written in vlang.
• v-pongstars9 - A classic paddle game brought back to life through the power of V.
• monkey_vstars33 - Implementation of Thorsten Ball's Monkey Language in V.
• Stasstars10 - A werid little stack based programming language written in V, created to learn the ins and outs of compilers.
• vbfstars18 - A brainfuck interpreter/compiler.
• vccstars82 - A C compiler written in V.
• vstars30.7k - V itself. Simple, fast, safe, compiled language for developing maintainable software.
• Vorkstars26 - Alternative V compiler/interpreter written in Python.
• Vinixstars1.4k - Small and simple OS in V. Runs bash.
• vpmstars28 - The V language package management tool written in V.
• vsetstars19 - A project setup and configuration tool for V projects.
• vlang-yamlstars17 - A V-native YAML reader, incl. YAML-to-JSON converter.
• Heroku Buildpack for Vstars20 - Deploy V apps on Heroku.
• vblogstars13 - A simple, fast and responsive blogging system.
• Vebview.JSstars23 - Electron/Neutralino.JS alternative written in V.
• Vieterstars5 - Archlinux repository server & package build system, written in V.
• Vlang Benchmarks Visualizationstars9 - Fancy statistics and plots for Is V still fast?.
• vorumstars184 - Open-source blogging/forum software written in V.
• vssstars7 - Easy-to-use static site generator.
• VTikstars13 - TikTok and Twitter video downloader app (CLI / Telegram Bot).
• miniaudiostars36 - Bindings for the excellent miniaudio C audio library.
• vavestars30 - A crazy simple library for reading/writing WAV files in V. 🌊
• vspeechstars38 - Complete V bindings for Mozilla's DeepSpeech TensorFlow based Speech-to-Text library. 📢📜
• vrobotstars40 - Desktop automation for V. Only supports Windows.
• spinnersstars15 - Create spinners in your terminal!
• redisstars52 - Redis client for V, written in V.
• vmemcachedstars11 - Memcached client for V, written in V.
• vsqlstars36 - A sql query builder for V.
• discord.vstars104 - User-friendly Discord bot library.
• viscordstars17 - Pretty basic library for connecting to the Discord gateway.
• vordstars3 - Library for interacting with user account endpoints and gateway (Self-bots, custom clients, etc).
• eventbus - A simple event bus system for V.
• v-mimestars20 - MIME detection library for V.
• vmonstars18 - Asynchronously watch for file changes in a directory. The module is essentially a V wrapper for septag/dmon. It works for Windows, macOS and Linux.
• V_ecsstars3 - ECS library made in V inspired by Bevy ECS.
• V Earcutstars8 - fast (real-time) polygon triangulation library based on mapbox/Earcutstars1.8k to handle holes, twisted polygons, degeneracies and self-intersections.
• vglstars24 - Low-level graphics API access.
• vgui - Minimal, lightweight and cross-platform GUI library.
• viupstars36 - V wrapper for the C-based cross-platform UI library, IUP.
• vsdl2stars40 - A libSDL2 wrapper.
• vsdlstars12 - V wrapper for the C-based SDL library.
• V_sokol_gpstars1 - A V wrapper for the sokol_gp library for easy and fast 2d graphics.
• vitricstars3 - A transparent IRC library.
• vmqstars15 - V wrapper For ZMQ (aka ZeroMQ, ØMQ, 0MQ: a high-performance asynchronous messaging library).
• vlipboardstars12 - An easy to use wrapper of clipboard with Wayland and Termux support.
• vplotstars13 - V wrapper for GNU Plot (gnuplot_i).
• vi2cstars7 - A tiny (wrapper) library for I2C serial communication for Linux written in V.
• vagistars3 - Asterisk FastAGI library in V.
• ascii_robotstars11 - ASCII Robot generator written in V.
• chalkstars19 - Colorize strings in the terminal.
• cjsonstars10 - Wrap cJSON for vlang.
• crayonstars43 - Paint your terminal output like Picasso. 🖍️🎨
• iconvstars3 - Wrap iconv for vlang.
• Rosie-RPLstars3 - A Rosie Pattern Language (RPL) implementation.
• strfmtstars4 - Tiny and fast string formatting library ideal for templating.
• v-regexstars14 - A simple regex library for V.
• muistars16 - A Cross-Platform UI library for Windows, Linux, Android and Web.
• V UIstars1.8k - Integrated cross platform UI toolkit for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and the web.
• rangestars25 - Functionality of Python's range() in V.
• vdotenvstars23 - Support for .env files which loads environment variables.
• pico.vstars69 - A web server in V based on picoev and picohttpparser.
• validatestars18 - A simple library to validate strings in V.
• valvalstars126 - Web framework written in V, improved by vweb.
• vcurrencystars7 - API wrapper (written in V) for https://api.exchangeratesapi.io.
• vexstars266 - Web framework written on V inspired by Express and Sinatra.
• vigeststars4 - Simple client for digest authentication (written in V).
• v-jsonrpcstars32 - Basic JSON-RPC 2.0-compliant server written on V.
• vweb - V's built-in web framework. Used by Vorum.
• vxbloauthstars9 - A minimalistic Xbox Live authenticator for vweb.
• An introduction to V
• Todo App with V
• Getting Started with V Programming - Navule Pavan Kumar Rao - Packt 2021 Dec - Introductory book on V.
• V Community
• sublime-vstars13 - Fully-featured Sublime Text 3 package for the V Programming Language.
• vim-vtoolsstars14 - V tools for Vim, including auto formatting.

• Stack Overflow
• action-create-v-docs - GitHub action to create documentation for V modules.
• setup-v - GitHub action to install and use V in your workflow.
• Simple Linux kernel module examplestars22 - Demonstration & test of writing a very simple Linux kernel module, using V.
• Advent of Code 2019stars11 - Solution of Advent of Code 2019 in V.
• Rosetta Code Vstars27 - Solutions for Rosetta Code in V.
• SoloLearn Coding Challengesstars13 - Implementation of the SoloLearn coding challenges in V.
• kate-syntax-highlight-vstars16 - V syntax highlighting for Kate.
• language-vstars5 - V language support for Atom (port of vscode-vlang).
• scite-v-supportstars2 - V syntax highlighting for SciTE.
• vim-vstars15 - Quality syntax highlighting for the V programming language.
• vlang-mode.elstars8 - Emacs major mode for the V programming language.
• vlang-sublimestars20 - Sublime text 3 Support for the Vlang Programming Language.
• v-modestars47 - Emacs major mode for the V programming language.
• vscode-vlangstars319 - V Language extension for Visual Studio Code.
• v-vimstars150 - Support for V syntax highlighting in Vim.
• Learn V in Y Minutesstars55
• V by Examplestars147 - V book as GitBook.
• V for Node Devsstars10 - Vlang for node js developers.
• V learning notesstars128 - Personal learning notes in Chinese.
• The V Programming Language
• V Programming Tutorials
• Lenra templatestars1 - The Lenra template to write V app for Lenra platform.
• vraylibstars1 - A V wrapper for the awesome raylib library.
• Videstars52
• veestars28 - V Editor Engine. A V module providing the guts of a text editor. Comes with a TUI editor example.
• vakerstars14 - A light-weight compile-time-generated data faker written in V.
• vserialportstars9 - V wrapper for libserialport.
• vserialxstars8 - A tiny (wrapper) serial communication library for Linux written in V.
• enginestars31 - WIP Vulkan in V.
• vesseractstars15 - V wrapper for Tesseract-OCR (optical character recognition).
• raylib.vstars30 - Updated V bindings for raylib with plans for complete cross-platform support.
• vraylibstars48 - V wrapper (bindings) for raylib, the C game development framework.
• mmapstars4 - Provide native V-lang support for memory-mapping on Linux and Windows.
• progressbarstars22 - An easy to use V library for creating progress bars in cli.
• termtablestars36 - V Terminal Tables: Simple and highly customizable library to display tables in the terminal.
• vargsstars36 - V library for parsing arguments from argv-like arrays. ( Archived )
• v-toxmlstars7 - XML Serialization library for V.
• vRayTracerstars42 - A simple ray tracer written in V.
• vedstars1.1k - 1 MB text editor written in V with hardware accelerated text rendering. Compiles in <1s.
• vprotostars46 - Protobuf compiler and runtime in V.
• V Playground
• randomstars15 - An all purpose random library written in V.
• vgramstars118 - Telegram bot library.
• lolstars14 - V version of lolcat (text/character rainbowizer).
• vgtk3stars50 - A wrapper for GTK3 in V.
• boxxstars84 - Create highly customizable terminal boxes that also look great! 📦
• clipboard - V module for interacting with the OS clipboard. Fully cross-platform.
• vigstars38 - Bindings for Dear ImGuistars42.2k GUI toolkit.
• vnkstars38 - Bindings for Nuklearstars13.5k GUI toolkit.
